title: Carthena Ledgers
subtitle: Brand Identity & Digital Marketing
overview: This project involved developing a cohesive social media visual system for Carthena Ledgers, a professional accounting and business advisory firm. The primary objective was to position the brand as a reliable partner that simplifies complex financial data into actionable insights. The campaign targets small to medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) and individuals seeking compliance, organization, and financial health.
problem: Accounting and business advisory firms often appear intimidating or overly complex to SMEs and individuals. The challenge was to humanize the brand while maintaining professionalism and trust.
solution: A cohesive social media visual system that positions Carthena Ledgers as a reliable, approachable partner. Clean layouts, professional imagery, and a refined color palette communicate trust and clarity, making financial concepts feel accessible.

features.title: Brand Identity System
features.description: Cohesive visual identity establishing Carthena Ledgers as a trusted, professional accounting partner.

features.title: Social Media Visual System
features.description: Consistent social media graphics that communicate financial clarity and approachability.

features.title: Digital Marketing Assets
features.description: Campaign creatives designed to simplify complex financial data into actionable insights.

results.description: Refined palette with clear, trustworthy layouts
